goal: Fix ESP01S long-press manual-control stutter scientifically without disabling closed-loop chassis control.
deliverable: ESP01S timing and browser command-contract changes that prevent held commands from being interrupted by idle-stop or incorrect turn semantics.
acceptance: Duplicate held HTTP commands refresh the manual-control watchdog.
ESP UART command refresh remains below STM32 command timeout.
Closed-loop turns send pure angular velocity commands.
Open-loop turns keep raw differential wheel semantics.
